title: Duckality - A Terramity Addon
description: Terramity addon that adds some staffs and accessories.
body:
Duckality is a Terramity addon that adds some magic staffs and accessories. I'm going to add more stuff in the future. Currently the mod adds 8 staffs, 15 accessories, 1 armor set and 1 sceptre. also duckys
<details>
<summary>shrieker staff</summary>
